title: November 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 8''' is the 312th day of the year (313th in leap years), with 53 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1926|1926]] – [[Ted Burnett]] is born.
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[Tony DeZuniga]] is born.
*1932 – [[Nicholas Kepros]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]] published. The cover date is February.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 40|''Star Wars Weekly'' 40]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[Prow Beaten]]" and "[[Baga's Rival]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2000]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Agent of Doom]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Grievous Getaway]]'' released.
*[[2006]] – [[Dark Times 1|''Dark Times'' 1]] published.
*2006 – ''[[Tag & Bink Were Here]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2012|''Star Wars Insider'' Special Edition 2012]] released in '''US'''.
*[[2012]] – [[Lucille Bliss]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 38|''Star Wars'' (2015) 38]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian — Season One, Part One]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The High Republic: Volume I]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars Insider Presents: Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season Two Volume Two]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: Visions]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – Episodes 14 - 19 of ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – "[[Charhound Chase / Creature Comforts]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2023 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 40|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 40]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2023) 1|''The High Republic'' (2023) 1]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight 2|''The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Roger Kastel]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Twilight of the Republic]]'' published.
